full_text:
Jiang Xian 蔣顯
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Jiang Xian (蔣顯)was born in Xiangxiang county, Lingling commandery. Sent by Liu Shan to order Jiang Wei to surrender. Jiang Xian was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and the Wei Kingdom. Jiang Xian lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
